findings.title: Smoke RBG red evidence is not a genuine failing run artifact
findings.description: gates.json points the smoke-spine-skeleton gate at this redRunPath, but the file contains only the Bun version header and EXIT:1. It does not include the failing assertion, expected and received values, test name, or any command output proving the matcher break caused the exactly-one-trace-line assertion to fail. A live reviewer run did reproduce the intended failure, but the durable machine-checked evidence path is still incomplete.

findings.title: Full-suite RBG red evidence is not a genuine failing run artifact
findings.description: gates.json points the bun-test-full-suite gate at this redRunPath, but the file contains only the Bun version header and EXIT:1. It does not show that bare bun test discovered the suite and failed because the smoke assertion failed, so the CI bun test gate lacks a genuine durable red-before-green pair in the required evidence path.
